props.header: Here is your message for Dr. Chris David's clinic. You can send it now to get updated referral form.
props.content:
Dear Team,

We received the referral form for the above-mentioned patient; however, the document is not clearly legible, and some details cannot be accurately interpreted. To ensure timely processing and avoid any delays in patient care, could you please share a clearer copy of the referral form at your earliest convenience?

Thank you for your prompt support.
